name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late financial reports. We automate expense report data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual data entry and report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual data entry and report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late financial reports. We automate expense report data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry and spreadsheet management

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late financial reports. We automate expense report data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
